title: Cliented
description: A fully client-side modpack designed to make your Minecraft experience more immersive.
body:
![Cliented](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a75d061c4f8deedc433ebd20a3e0596b18a482b.png)

This is a **fully client-sided** modpack carefully designed to enhance immersion without changing the core gameplay you already love. By focusing entirely on visuals, sounds, and overall atmosphere, it makes Minecraft feel more alive while remaining fully compatible with vanilla servers.

> **_Switching texture packs_?**
> Just disable **Immersive Interfaces** and **MandalaGUI**, and your new pack will work perfectly! (See image below)
> 
> ![Image showing two texture pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc596ebda435ece7e50b32dddd05b2997aa429b0.png)




**↓ A list of some of the mods that are in this modpack. ↓**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

```
✨ Immersion & Ambiance

- AmbientSounds
- Presence Footsteps
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Distant Horizons
```



```
🏃 Animations

- Tiny Item Animations
- NotEnoughAnimations
- LambDynamicLights
- Inventory Particles
```



```
🚀 Performance

- Sodium
- ImmediatelyFast
- FerriteCore
- EntityCulling
- Lithium
- Dynamic FPS
```



```
🛠️ Utilities & Quality of Life

- Smooth UI
- Chat Heads
- Simple Voice Chat
- Armor Hud
- Jade
- Nemo's Inventory Sorter
- Zoomify
```



```
🎨 Visuals

- Iris
- Visuality
- Polytone
- Continuity
- 3d-Skin-Layers
```

_And more!_

</details>

(None of the mods and texture packs are mine, please support their developers).
